# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service:8080
    path: /
    upstream_tags: ["user-service"]
    tags: ["direct"]

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service:8081
    path: /
    upstream_tags: ["product-service"]
    tags: ["direct"]

routes:
  - name: get-users
    paths:
      - /users/*
    targets:
      - user-service

  - name: get-products
    paths:
      - /products/*
    targets:
      - product-service

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - host: user-service:8080, path: /
    loadbalancer:
      method: round-robin

  - name: product-upstream
    targets:
      - host: product-service:8081, path: /
    loadbalancer:
      method: round-robin

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in: query
      key: apikey

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      period: 10m
      limit: 1000
